e.p: Is my flight delayed?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' và nói nếu chuyến bay trễ.
e.s: Yes, your flight is late.

e.p: How long is the delay?
e.m: Nói thời gian trễ ngắn gọn (ví dụ: one hour, two hours).
e.h: Dùng: It is late by + time.
e.s: It is late by two hours.

e.p: What time does the plane leave now?
e.m: Nói giờ khởi hành mới ngắn gọn.
e.s: It leaves at ten o'clock.

e.p: Where is the information desk?
e.m: Nói nơi đặt bàn thông tin ngắn gọn (ví dụ: near gate 3).
e.h: Dùng: It is + place / near + place.
e.s: It is near gate three.

e.p: Can I get a meal voucher now?
e.m: Nói 'Yes, you can' hoặc 'No, you can't'.
e.s: Yes, you can.

e.p: Where is your bag?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn để hành lý cuối cùng ngắn gọn.
e.h: Dùng: I left it at / on / in + place.
e.s: I left it at the check-in desk.

e.p: What does your bag look like?
e.m: Mô tả hành lý bằng một câu ngắn (màu và loại).
e.s: It is a black suitcase.

e.p: Do you have a baggage tag?
e.s: No, I don't have a tag.

e.p: Can we call you if we find it?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes, call me' hoặc 'No, thank you'.
e.s: Yes, call me, please.

e.p: Will my bag come on the next flight?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và nói nếu bạn biết.
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + it + will / won't + come.
e.s: Yes, it will come on the next flight.

e.p: Is this your name on the ticket?
e.s: No, it is not my name.

e.p: What is your full name on the booking?
e.m: Nói tên đầy đủ ngắn gọn (dùng [studentName] nếu cần).
e.s: My name is [studentName].

e.p: Do you need a seat change?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' và nói ngắn lý do nếu 'Yes'.
e.s: Yes, I need a window seat.

e.p: Can we change your seat now?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes, please' hoặc 'No, thank you'.
e.s: Yes, please.

e.p: Do you pay a fee for the change?
e.s: No, you don't pay a fee.

e.p: Did you miss your connection?
e.s: Yes, I missed my connection.

e.p: Where do you need to go next?
e.m: Nói điểm đến tiếp theo ngắn gọn.
e.h: Dùng: I need to go to + place.
e.s: I need to go to Hanoi.

e.p: Can we book you on the next flight?
e.s: Yes, you can.

e.p: Do you have another ticket?
e.s: No, I don't have another ticket.

e.p: Is there a hotel for passengers now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và nếu có, nói 'Yes, there is' hoặc 'No, there isn't'.
e.s: Yes, there is a hotel near the airport.

d.t: Thay đổi cổng lên máy bay

e.p: Has my gate changed?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' và nói nếu biết.
e.s: Yes, your gate has changed.

e.p: What is the new gate number?
e.m: Nói số cổng mới ngắn gọn.
e.s: It is gate five.

e.p: Is the gate far from here?
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + it + is/is not + far.
e.s: No, it is not far.

e.p: Can I walk to the new gate?
e.s: Yes, you can walk there.

e.p: Do I need to show my boarding pass again?
e.s: Yes, you do need to show it.

e.p: Is my flight cancelled?
e.s: Yes, your flight is cancelled.

e.p: Can I get a refund?
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + you + can/can't + get + refund.
e.s: Yes, you can get a refund.

e.p: Do you want a new flight today?
e.s: Yes, I want a new flight today.

e.p: Is there another flight now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không bằng 'Yes, there is' hoặc 'No, there isn't'.
e.s: Yes, there is another flight now.

e.p: Do I need to go to the desk?
e.s: Yes, you do need to go to the desk.

d.t: Vấn đề với taxi sân bay

e.p: Is the taxi ready?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' và nói nếu biết.
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + it + is/is not + ready.
e.s: Yes, the taxi is ready.

e.p: Can you take me to the city center?
e.s: Yes, I can take you to the city center.

e.p: How much is the ride?
e.m: Nói một giá tiền ngắn gọn bằng số hoặc từ (ví dụ: twenty).
e.h: Dùng: It is + number / It costs + number.
e.s: It costs twenty dollars.

e.p: Do you accept cards?
e.s: No, I don't accept cards.

e.p: Is there a problem with the taxi meter?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và nói ngắn nếu có.
e.s: No, there is no problem with the meter.

e.p: Is this your reservation?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' và nói tên nếu cần.
e.s: Yes, this is my reservation.

e.p: Is the room clean?
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + it + is/is not + clean.
e.s: No, the room is not clean.

e.p: Can we change your room now?
e.s: Yes, you can change my room.

e.p: Do you want a quiet room?
e.s: Yes, I want a quiet room.

e.p: Is breakfast included in the booking?
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + breakfast + is/is not + included.
e.s: Yes, breakfast is included.

e.p: Do you have your passport?
e.s: No, I don't have my passport.

e.p: Where did you leave it?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn để hộ chiếu ngắn gọn.
e.h: Dùng: I left it at / in / on + place.
e.s: I left it at home.

e.p: Can you show another ID?
e.s: Yes, I can show my ID card.

e.p: Do you need help from the embassy?
e.s: No, I don't need help from the embassy.

e.p: Is it a problem to travel without it?
e.m: Trả lời có/không bằng một câu ngắn.
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + it + is/is not + a problem.
e.s: Yes, it is a problem to travel without a passport.

e.p: Is my bag overweight?
e.s: Yes, your bag is overweight.

e.p: How much is the extra fee?
e.m: Nói số tiền ngắn gọn (ví dụ: ten).
e.s: It costs ten dollars.

e.p: Can I move items to my hand luggage?
e.s: Yes, you can move items to your hand luggage.

e.p: Do you need help packing?
e.s: No, I don't need help packing.

e.p: Is the fee paid at the desk?
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + it + is/is not + at the desk.
e.s: Yes, the fee is paid at the desk.

e.p: Is the name on the ticket correct?
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + the name + is/is not + correct.
e.s: No, the name on the ticket is not correct.

e.p: What is the correct name?
e.m: Nói tên đúng ngắn gọn (dùng [studentName] nếu cần).
e.s: My name is [studentName].

e.p: Can we fix the name now?
e.s: Yes, you can fix the name now.

e.p: Do I need to pay for the change?
e.s: No, you don't need to pay.

e.p: Is my boarding allowed with the wrong name?
e.m: Trả lời có/không bằng một câu ngắn.
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + you + are/are not + allowed.
e.s: No, you are not allowed to board with the wrong name.

d.t: Yêu cầu hoàn tiền đơn giản

e.p: Can I get a refund for my ticket?
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + you + can/can't + get + refund.
e.s: Yes, you can get a refund.

e.p: Do I need my receipt?
e.s: Yes, you do need your receipt.

e.p: How long is the refund process?
e.m: Nói thời gian ngắn gọn (ví dụ: two days).
e.s: It takes two days.

e.p: Can I get the money now?
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + you + can/can't + get now.
e.s: No, you can't get the money now.

e.p: Do I get a full refund?
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + you + do/don't + get + full refund.
e.s: No, you don't get a full refund.

d.t: Ôn tập: Tình huống sân bay

e.p: Is the flight on time?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' và nói nếu trễ.
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + S + is + on time / late.
e.s: No, the flight is late.

e.p: Where is gate seven?
e.m: Nói vị trí cổng đơn giản.
e.h: Dùng: It is + place / near + place.
e.s: It is near the coffee shop.

e.p: Do you have a lost bag?
e.s: Yes, I have a lost bag.

e.p: Can we change your flight today?
e.s: Yes, you can change my flight today.

e.p: Is there a hotel near the airport?
e.m: Trả lời có/không bằng 'Yes, there is' hoặc 'No, there isn't'.
e.s: Yes, there is a hotel near the airport.

d.t: Ôn tập: Hành lý và khách sạn

e.p: Is my bag heavy?
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + it + is/is not + heavy.
e.s: Yes, your bag is heavy.

e.p: Can I bring a carry-on bag?
e.s: Yes, you can bring one carry-on bag.

e.p: Is the room ready now?
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + it + is/is not + ready.
e.s: No, the room is not ready now.

e.p: Do you want a single or double room?
e.m: Trả lời loại phòng ngắn gọn.
e.s: I want a single room.

e.p: Can we store your luggage?
e.s: Yes, you can store my luggage.

d.t: Ôn tập: Khiếu nại và hỗ trợ

e.p: Is there a problem with your seat?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' và mô tả ngắn nếu có.
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + it + is/is not + + adjective.
e.s: Yes, the seat is broken.

e.p: Can we give you a new ticket?
e.s: Yes, you can give me a new ticket.

e.p: Do you want help with a hotel booking?
e.s: Yes, I want help with a hotel booking.

e.p: Is the staff here to help you now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không bằng một câu ngắn.
e.h: Dùng: Yes/No + the staff + is/are + here.
e.s: Yes, the staff is here to help me now.

e.p: Can you wait at the desk?
e.s: Yes, I can wait at the desk.
